_notes: WebShop Flat GRPO on the AlfWorld SOTA recipe (rank-32 + MLP target modules, K=8, kl=0.04, lr=5e-6, T=1.0 launcher) PLUS the new WebShop-specific dense signal (env.use_attribute_progress_intermediate_reward=true). With hgpo.alpha=1.0 the choice of decomposer is mathematically inert (only the trajectory advantage survives) — decomposer=progress is the parameter-free baseline; turnrd block and vProjection knobs are intentionally dropped. The dense signal still benefits Flat GRPO via the per-turn raw_env_reward field being non-zero on intermediate progress turns (vs all-zeros-then-terminal-spike on Phase 0 WebShop), giving the policy a sharper gradient at trajectory-level. seed=23 (NOT 11) so the train task-id slice is disjoint from the HGPO-Attention run. Launcher: scripts/run_webshop_SOTA_flatGRPO_v1.sh.
